title: Personal Loan Agreement
description: Loan agreement for friends and family, containing interest rate settings, monthly payments, and default terms.
whatsCovered: Loan principal size and date of transfer
Interest rate calculation (annual percentage rate - APR)
Late payment penalties and grace periods
Acceleration of balance due upon default
whenToUse: Use this loan agreement to document a personal loan between friends or family members, ensuring clear repayment paths.

clauses.heading: PERSONAL LOAN AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the Personal Loan Agreement. The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. Loan Repayments and Interest
clauses.body: Lender advances principal of {loan_principal} at interest rate of {apr_interest}% APR. Borrower shall make structured monthly installments.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
